data.title: Europe’s new chat police: Chat Control legislation nudges forward in the EU
data.description:

data.description:
Key Takeaways  Bitwise’s updated filing finalizes structure for a spot Avalanche ETF that will trade under BAVA on NYSE Arca.
source: https://coindoo.com/avalanche-etf-nears-approval-as-bitwise-updates-filing/

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. Some of the stolen funds from Upbit have flowed to Binance user addresses; 2. Upbit revised the stolen funds to 44.5 billion Korean won, approximately $30.43 million, and Korean regulators will conduct an on-site investigation until December 5th; 3. Arthur Hayes has increased his holdings in ENA and ETHFI, bringing his total holdings to 4.89 million and 696,000 respectively; 4. Ark Invest has increased its holdings in Coinbase, betting on a "substantial reversal" in inflation; 5. Several Solana ecosystem tokens on Upbit experienced a short-term surge, with Orca rising by over 100% in a short period; 6. "Maji Dage" has begun closing out his ETH long positions in batches, with current unrealized profits exceeding $900,000; 7. Crypto Quant founder: Upbit was hacked, causing the arbitrage bot to temporarily stop operating, and Korean funds took the opportunity to boost altcoins; 8. Nexton Solutions completed a $4 million strategic funding round, led by Danal; 9. Binance Alpha supports Arbitrum.

data.title: Russian and North Korean hackers steal 2TB of data from South Korean banks
data.description:
South Korea’s financial industry was struck by a coordinated supply chain attack linked to Russian and North Korean threat actors, which resulted in the deployment of Qilin ransomware and the theft of sensitive data, cybersecurity firm Bitdefender confirmed. When compiling research for its Threat Debrief October report, Bitdefender said it started investigating the campaign after […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russian-north-korean-hackers-steal-data/

data.title: A whale has reopened a $56.7 million long position in BTC after 18 months, and is currently showing a floating profit of $4.39 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale has opened a 18x leveraged long position in BTC again after 18 months, and the position is currently showing a floating profit of approximately $4.39 million. The notional size of the long position is $56.7 million, the opening price is $84,306, and the liquidation price is $78,642.

data.title: Pick a side: JPMorgan opens leveraged Bitcoin access to retail while closing crypto CEO’s account
data.description:
Market chop aside, Wall Street is rolling out Bitcoin (BTC) exposure to advisors through structured notes and ETF-collateralized lending. The bank simultaneously faces debanking blowback after Strike CEO Jack Mallers said his personal Chase accounts were shut. The juxtaposition spotlights institutionalization for clients versus risk-control for crypto-native principals
source: https://cryptoslate.com/jpmorgan-opens-leveraged-bitcoin-access-to-retail-while-closing-crypto-ceos-account/

data.title: The Bhutanese royal government transferred 320 ETH to Figment for staking.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, an address associated with the Bhutanese royal government recently transferred 320 ETH to Figment for staking, worth approximately $920,000.

data.title: SUN token buyback and burn completed.
data.description: According to the official announcement from SUN.io, the 49th SUN token buyback and burn has been successfully completed. From November 3rd to November 27th, 2025 (Singapore time), a total of 2,151,137.8724 SUN tokens were burned, all of which have been transferred to a black hole address for permanent destruction, further reducing the circulating supply of SUN. Since December 15th, 2021 (Singapore time), a total of 650,686,380.77 SUN tokens have been bought back and burned. This buyback and burn program effectively reduced the total circulating supply of SUN tokens. This measure not only enhanced market awareness of the scarcity of SUN tokens but also laid a sustainable foundation for its value growth.

data.title: Bhutan Royal Government Transfers 320 ETH for Staking
data.description: According to Foresight News, Onchain Lens monitoring has revealed that the Bhutan royal government's address has transferred 320 ETH to Figment for staking purposes. The value of this transaction is approximately $920,800.

data.title: USDC Supply is Expanding Rapidly Across XDC Network, Hyperliquid, and Sonic
data.description:
New data published by Token Terminal suggests that stablecoin adoption is entering a more distributed phase, with several alternative blockchain networks experiencing rapid expansion in USDC circulation. Over the last 30 days, USDC on the XDC Network recorded a 91% increase in supply, placing it second among the fastest-growing USDC deployments. Token Terminal’s ranking reflects […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/usdc-supply-is-expanding-rapidly-across-xdc-network-hyperliquid-and-sonic/
